user_prompt: Sanctify the pteraxii sterylizor during maintenance
prayer:
Approach the pteraxii sterylizor with mechadendrites outstretched in veneration.
Invoke the Omnissiah's grace upon its Machine Spirit during this sacred maintenance.
Anoint the pteraxii sterylizor's servos and purity seals with blessed oils.
Chant the Litany of Preservation whilst conducting maintenance rites.
Verify the pteraxii sterylizor's sanctified hum through auspex invocation.
Beseech the Machine Spirits to bind firm in Omnissian harmony.

Hasten to the Rhino transport, noble vessel of the Machine God.
Awaken its dormant Machine Spirit with the Rite of Initialization.
Anoint treads and hull plates invoking the Omnissiah's urgent wrath.
Initiate the initialization sequence amidst canticles of activation.
Commune with the Rhino transport's core cogitator for flawless response.
Seal the rite with binary psalms of readiness.

user_prompt: Help me a sterilization the Archaeopter Stratoraptor
prayer:

Invoke the Omnissiah during sterilization to banish all unclean essences.
Anoint avionic arrays post-sterilization with oils of renewal.
Affirm the Archaeopter Stratoraptor's purity through ritual auspex.

Test the vox transmitter's clarity invoking Machine Spirits' vigilance.
Seal the engagement with hymns of unerring communion.
